entries.selector: legacy chart locators|lookup fallback|barre derivation
claimLimitations: No chart bytes may affect production output.
A future reviewed release must retain exact chart, source, rights, and activation identity.

entries.selector: bundled raw YAML profileSources and browser startup profile cache
claimLimitations: Cache identity must match the exact YAML bytes; no stale fallback may add guidance.

entries.selector: HistoricalPracticeClaim|KnowledgePack legacy records and mutation APIs
claimLimitations: Legacy records remain inspectable but cannot become canonical activation authority.
The legacy reviewed flag is not an ADR 0022 attestation or activation decision.

entries.selector: PersonalDefault|PersonalDefaultCandidate|OwnerChoice records and reviewed Owner-default bridge
claimLimitations: Owner-local choices affect only the Owner-local guidance lane.
A personal default cannot grant historical, pedagogical, or specialist authority.
Evaluator-side learning can create only an inactive candidate through the explicit Owner-reviewed production bridge; activation remains a separate Owner approval.

entries.selector: createArrangementCompileRoute dispatch by notationLayouts|instrumentId|source_voice role
claimLimitations: Dispatch selects a maintained projection from explicit target state; it does not establish historical or idiomatic authority.
The production route must cross the observation-only authority guard before reading arrangement state or compiling.

entries.selector: layout selection|staff conventions|template defaults
claimLimitations: Maintained layout defaults are editorial, not historical-practice evidence.

entries.selector: trusted absolute executable resolution|minimal subprocess environment
claimLimitations: Trusted absolute resolution and a minimal environment prevent runtime environment substitution but do not pin executable bytes or certify tool output.
Filesystem, network, and resource isolation constrain execution only; they supply no bibliographic, extraction, musical, historical, specialist, or activation authority.

entries.selector: compile format default|digest-pinned LilyPond sandbox|validation acceptance
claimLimitations: Compiler selection and validation determine executable output acceptance but confer no historical or idiomatic authority.

entries.selector: pitch|duration|course|fret|voice|figure|diapason deterministic projections
claimLimitations: Deterministic projection does not claim idiomatic or historical suitability.

entries.selector: semantic part to MIDI/audio projection and playback identity
claimLimitations: Synthesized preview does not establish performance-practice or human-playability claims.

entries.selector: classification policy|entry definitions|reviewed exclusions|shadow fixture registry
claimLimitations: Classification metadata cannot authorize musical behavior or certify manifest completeness.
The pinned builder and an independent validator remain separate trust inputs.

entries.selector: fixed macOS Keychain executable|closed credential subprocess environment|permission-restricted credential fallback
claimLimitations: The fixed Keychain boundary prevents ambient executable substitution and credential exfiltration; it does not attest the identity or behavior of a connected model provider.
Credential bytes are operational authentication state, not musical or knowledge authority; write and delete methods consume this security boundary but do not produce authority outputs.

entries.selector: assertAuthorityPathRuntime classification-only production gate
claimLimitations: The guard validates only frozen T08 classification and grants no musical or knowledge authority.
Complete manifest resolution and activation remain unavailable until the later resolver cutover.

entries.selector: schema-validated workspace record recovery|canonical collection relinking
claimLimitations: Recovery can restore visibility of already persisted, schema-valid records; it cannot create musical evidence or authorize knowledge.

entries.selector: core-baroque-guitar built-in pack and legacy loader
claimLimitations: The self-declared reviewed field is not release or activation authority.
The legacy loader returns no active packs.

entries.selector: target defaults|plan proportions|policy selections|fallback parameters
claimLimitations: Fallback parameters cannot masquerade as Owner intent or reviewed idiom.

entries.selector: compile retry limit, stall classification, and recovery guidance
claimLimitations: Retry policy may stop or guide compilation recovery but cannot establish musical or historical correctness.

entries.selector: default diapason schemes and key-based selection
claimLimitations: Key-based diapason suggestions are software defaults, not claims of universal historical practice.

entries.selector: owner request classification|selection anchors|manual edit validation|version lineage
claimLimitations: Owner edits and intent govern the Owner's requested output but do not grant historical authority.
Model-proposed intent remains a proposal until accepted through the Owner boundary.

entries.selector: tempo|arpeggiation|inequality|articulation|principal voice ornament|literal default
claimLimitations: Playback interpretation is Owner-local and does not alter the canonical arrangement score.
Default synthesized playback is not evidence of historical performance practice.

entries.selector: source upload media-type and rights-unknown defaults
claimLimitations: A missing upload assertion defaults to rights unknown and never supplies positive use or redistribution authority.

entries.selector: status|readiness|authority|historical|playability presentation labels
claimLimitations: Labels present persisted state and cannot upgrade its authority.

entries.selector: name|notation|constraints|origin|descriptive and idiomatic fields
claimLimitations: Profile prose and constraints cannot grant historical or pedagogical precedence.
Mechanical and guidance fields are deliberately separate inventory entries.

entries.selector: id|type|courses|strings|tuning|frets|range mechanical fields; excludes constraints and descriptive labels
claimLimitations: Unmeasured geometry, comfort, reliability, and historical authenticity remain unknown.

entries.selector: ExactAssetReferencePageAtlasSourceProfileResolver.resolveMaceProfile exact sha256|byteLength|mediaType|pageCount routing
claimLimitations: An exact byte and page-count tuple selects only a maintainer-reviewed software profile; a match does not establish bibliographic identity or extraction correctness.
The routed profile remains candidate input and conveys no historical, specialist, Owner-review, activation, release, or publication authority.

entries.selector: literal examples in buildWorkflow|buildBaroqueGuitarWorkflow
claimLimitations: Examples are workflow illustrations, not evidence of historical correctness.
Quarantined alfabeto data remains unavailable.

entries.selector: buildRole|buildTools|buildWorkflow|buildBaroqueGuitarWorkflow|buildContinuoWorkflow|buildImitativeCounterpointWorkflow
claimLimitations: Compatibility behavior only until the complete manifest cutover.
Must not be presented as historical-practice or specialist-reviewed authority.

entries.selector: INTERACTIVE_GUIDANCE_POLICY.systemPrompt|purpose|toolCapabilities|maxTokens
claimLimitations: The system prompt is a software policy, not specialist or historical authority.
Provider output remains bounded by the Model Action commit and review contract.

entries.selector: arrangeContinuo|candidate scoring|disposition ranking
claimLimitations: Current scoring is not a source-backed realization profile.

entries.selector: instrument-specific suggested destination keys
claimLimitations: Suggested keys rank convenience only and do not prove playability or historical idiom.

entries.selector: arrangeImitativeIntabulation|rankImitativeAssignments
claimLimitations: Assignment ranking is not evidence of a historical intabulation school.

entries.selector: arrangeFaithfulPluckedString|arrangeFaithfulBaroqueGuitar|candidate scoring|styleBriseAuthorization
claimLimitations: Shared search weights are software heuristics, not target-specific idiom authority.
Three target families remain independent evaluation subjects.

entries.selector: candidate ordering|constraint precedence|plan specialization|narrow defaults
claimLimitations: Selection precedence cannot confer authority on a profile or pack.

entries.selector: AgentTool name|label|description|parameters and compatibility aliases
claimLimitations: Tool wording and defaults do not establish historical authority.

entries.selector: alfabetoLookup tracked-source authorization denial|resolveAlfabetoMatch fail-closed projection
claimLimitations: The production path may return only a structured denial until an exact reviewed chart release exists; it cannot expose or activate legacy chart bytes.

entries.selector: production arrangement evaluation-card status and evidence projection
claimLimitations: The card reports deterministic software checks over recorded lineage; it cannot establish historical correctness, player comfort, or independent musical quality.

entries.selector: canonical JSON-shaped production record identity digest
claimLimitations: A stable content digest proves byte-equivalent canonical record identity only; it grants no musical, historical, or reviewer authority.

entries.selector: stretch|shift|right-hand|difficulty thresholds and default parameter bounds
claimLimitations: Default thresholds cannot establish player-specific comfort or reliability.

entries.selector: evaluation predicates|comparison|promotion|release floors|human evidence
claimLimitations: Evaluator logic cannot feed production generation or candidate ranking directly.

The sole current evaluator-to-production transition is the explicit Owner-reviewed Personal Default Candidate bridge; it cannot activate a default and independently validates the Owner review boundary.

Evaluation runner attribution covers evaluator records produced through EvaluationHarness; transient canonical-workspace writes remain attributed to the guarded production writer boundaries each runner invokes.

entries.selector: range|course|fret|tuning|string collision|sounding pitch deterministic checks
claimLimitations: Mechanically possible does not mean comfortable, idiomatic, or historically supported.

entries.selector: immutable generation publication|writer kinds|record kinds|CAS visibility|read-only default route
claimLimitations: Atomic publication preserves decision integrity but does not create epistemic authority.
The generic production mutation route remains disabled unless explicitly injected.

entries.selector: typed evidence graph|source closure|pack citation authority|test-only attestation|immutable reviewed-knowledge release
claimLimitations: Graph validity and test-only attestations do not create epistemic, activation, or historical-practice authority.
Pack-citation rights verification is exact-operation and as-of scoped; it does not grant reusable, human, or broader publication authority.

entries.selector: legacy flat-arrangement canonicality policy
claimLimitations: Legacy flat-file canonicality labels deny canonical status but cannot establish positive musical or historical authority.

entries.selector: legacy pack identity and digest metadata without activation
claimLimitations: Digesting and listing quarantined packs does not activate them or confer reviewed historical authority.

entries.selector: egress authorization|provider identity|tool denial|result commit|publication validation
claimLimitations: A committed provider result remains software output and cannot self-attest historical claims.
Provider authorization does not authorize tools, source egress, or activation consequences.

entries.selector: analyzeMusicologicalScore|classification thresholds|preservation-target inference
claimLimitations: Inferred labels are software outputs until supported by explicit reviewed evidence.

entries.selector: readiness evidence precedence|blocking outcomes|readiness status and rationale
claimLimitations: Readiness labels summarize exact scoped Owner evidence and cannot upgrade its role, scope, or authority.
The production path must cross the observation-only authority guard before reading evidence or persisting a playtest.

entries.selector: preservation precedence|change classification|editorial acceptance
claimLimitations: Editorial preservation policy remains distinct from source historical authority.

entries.selector: authority facet policy|inventory closure|rights and retention consequences|controlled source identity
claimLimitations: Rights and lifecycle policy can deny use but cannot supply positive musical authority.
Reference identity and storage integrity remain distinct from historical-practice review.

Page Atlas workflows stage non-authoritative candidates and citation lineage only; parser output and source-profile routing cannot supply bibliographic, extraction, historical, specialist, or activation authority.

entries.selector: OMR confidence|voice-name inference|best-effort score|uncertainty and correction semantics
claimLimitations: Confidence and inferred voices remain reviewable evidence, never documentary authority.

entries.selector: symbolic parser|written event|voice|meter|key deterministic normalization
claimLimitations: Syntactic normalization does not establish documentary identity or resolve ambiguous notation.

Page enumeration, geometry parsing, component-version observation, and rasterization describe bounded tool output only; they establish no source identity, extraction truth, citation authority, or musical interpretation.

entries.selector: interval, chordification, analysis, and voice-leading theory operations
claimLimitations: Theory operations are deterministic software interpretations and do not establish source truth or historical practice.

entries.selector: provider response aliases|missing key/time/chord/violation defaults
claimLimitations: Aliases and defaults validate provider output but confer no documentary or musicological authority.

entries.selector: tracked source inventory validation and operation authorization
claimLimitations: Authorization can deny an operation but cannot supply missing rights evidence or musical authority.
